description: Track trustworthy file activity and explore it by folder. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Activity Map

name: Activity Map

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

Activity Map v0.2.0 adds more ways to see and share focused work across your vault.

### Features
- **More focus visibility**: Add the Typed Chars metric to see characters entered across files and folders.
- **Activity posters**: Export the current result as a theme-matched PNG poster with an optional caption.

### Fixes
- **Current-day updates**: Keep the default Today view current after crossing local midnight.

### Improvements
- **Remembered view options**: The Header summary remembers your selected metric and time range.
- **Easier controls**: Improve keyboard access and clarity for metric and range controls.

---

Activity Map v0.2.0 新增了更多查看和分享 vault 专注投入的方式。

### 新功能
- **更多专注可视化**：新增 Typed Chars 指标，查看不同文件和目录中的输入字符数。
- **活动海报**：将当前结果导出为匹配主题、可添加说明文字的 PNG 海报。

### 修复
- **当天视图更新**：本地日期跨越午夜后，默认的当天视图会保持更新。

### 改进
- **记住查看偏好**：页眉统计会记住你选择的指标和时间范围。
- **更顺手的控件**：改进指标和时间范围控件的键盘操作与清晰度。

## What's Changed
* Release Activity Map v0.1.0 by @ffy6511 in https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/pull/1
* ci(release): run publish workflow on Node 26.4.0 by @ffy6511 in https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/pull/2
* fix(release): make Node 26 validation safe by @ffy6511 in https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/pull/3
* fix(release): make Node 26 validation safe by @ffy6511 in https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/pull/4

## New Contributors
* @ffy6511 made their first contribution in https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0
releases.name: Activity Map 0.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

Activity Map v0.1.0 is the first public release of a local-first way to understand where focused time goes in your Obsidian vault. It records trustworthy per-file activity and makes the results available directly from the active file header.

### Features

- Track active time, editing time, and file-open counts for the focused file. Background windows, untrackable views, paused tracking, and confirmed idle time are excluded.
- Exclude long sleep and lock-screen gaps from activity totals, while allowing short uncertain gaps to be reviewed explicitly.
- Explore a selected day, 7/30/90-day daily averages, all-history averages, and all-history totals. Drill into folders or switch to a recursive file view for the current path.
- Open a pinnable activity summary from the compact donut in eligible file headers. The header is the only Activity Map entry point; there is no global toolbar button or Command Palette command.
- Keep activity data local to the vault configuration directory. Activity Map includes no account, telemetry, remote API, or upload path, and does not read or store note content, selected text, or typed strings.

### Fixes

- Preserve trustworthy activity and recovery evidence across interruptions and restarts.
- Keep the open summary popover stable during live updates and folder drill-down, and retain the selected path/file grouping across reopen and restart.

### Improvements

- Provide synchronized, keyboard-accessible chart and detail views with stable colors; smaller chart slices can be grouped as “Other” without hiding their detail rows.

---

Activity Map v0.1.0 是首个公开版本，提供本地优先的方式，帮助你了解自己在 Obsidian vault 中的专注投入。它记录可信的逐文件活动数据，并直接在当前文件的页眉中展示统计入口。

### 新功能

- 记录当前聚焦文件的活动时长、编辑时长和打开次数；后台窗口、不可追踪视图、暂停期间和已确认的空闲时间不会计入。
- 自动排除休眠和锁屏造成的长时间间隔，并允许你明确决定是否补计较短的未确定间隔。
- 支持指定日、7/30/90 天日均、全部历史日均和全部历史总量；可逐层查看目录，也可切换为当前路径下的递归文件视图。
- 在符合条件的文件页眉中，通过微型环形图打开可固定的活动统计浮层。页眉是唯一入口，不提供全局工具栏按钮或命令面板命令。
- 活动数据仅保存在 vault 配置目录中；不包含账号、遥测、远程 API 或上传路径，也不会读取或保存笔记正文、选中文本和实际输入内容。

### 修复

- 在中断和重启后保留可信的活动记录与恢复依据。
- 保持统计浮层在实时更新和目录下钻时稳定，并在重新打开或重启后保留路径/文件分组选择。

### 改进

- 图表和明细列表使用同步数据，支持键盘操作与稳定配色；即使较小切片被合并为“其他”，对应明细仍会保留。

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ffy6511/obsidian-activity-map/commits/0.1.0
releases.name: Activity Map 0.1.0
